channel.title: Npm on BenzHub
channel.description: Recent content in Npm on BenzHub

item.title: NVM vs NPM vs Node.js: What's the Difference? Complete Guide
item.description: When starting out with JavaScript development, you will inevitably encounter three terms: NVM, NPM, and Node.js. In short, Node.js is the JavaScript runtime, NPM is the package manager that ships with Node.js, and NVM is a version manager that lets you install and switch between multiple Node.js versions on the same machine. This article breaks down NVM vs NPM vs Node.js in detail, including the correct installation flow, essential commands, and best practices for team collaboration.
